title: Magazine Features
excerpt: So honored to be in these gorgeous magazines - Project Calm and BELONG ! It's so fun being able to hold these in your hands and flip through them. The design work in both of them is so inspiring. Let…
body: So honored to be in these gorgeous magazines - Project Calm and BELONG! It's so fun being able to hold these in your hands and flip through them. The design work in both of them is so inspiring. Let me know if you find these on newsstands and get them in your hands!
